rulings.Case Title: JOSE CERON ET AL VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 19, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFFs JOSE CERON, WENDY ENRIQUEZ, and DERIK ENDERSON's Motion To Compel GRANTED. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections within 14 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,470 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of this order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE CERON ET AL VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Deem Admissions Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 19, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFFs JOSE CERON, WENDY ENRIQUEZ, and DERIK ENDERSON's Motion To Deem Admissions Admitted DENIED as follows: responses have been provided prior to the hearing. Objections interposed within late responses are stricken. Sanctions granted in the amount of $700 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CATHERINE CARTER VS. MICHAEL CLAGG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 19, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANTs MICHAEL CLAGG and MEGHAN MILLER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint alleges that a 60 days notice was served by posting and mailing, a method authorized by CC 1946.1 and CCP 1162. These allegations must be taken as true on a demurrer. = (501/REQ)
